/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -O2 -march=x86-64-v3 -mavx2 -mfma CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/SlimprotoClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/HttpStreamClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/Decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/FlacDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/PcmDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/DsdProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/DsdStreamReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/AudioHttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/UPnPController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/Mp3Decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/OggDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/slim2upnp.dir/src/FfmpegDecoder.cpp.o -o slim2upnp  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFLAC.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libupnp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libixml.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmpg123.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbisfile.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libogg.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so
